title: Enhanced dependencies

posts.author: papakyriacou (Alex Papakyriacou)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board which uses the dependencies column.

I would like to create a second column to show which items the specific item is a dependency for.

For example, item “training staff” is dependent on item “training material available”. What I would like is for the item “training material available” to have a column “is a dependency for”, which will automatically show “training staff”.

posts.author: Yossi (Yossi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @papakyriacou, did you ever find a solution for this?
I’ve had the same issue. The best i’ve come up with was making a mirrored column called Blocking and when creating the task i set the dependancy and the blocking. It’s not an ideal solution but a useable workaround for the moment.
